notes: Expanded quiz prompts to include altered degree labels: b2, b3, #4, b6, and b7.
Added double-accidental normalization so generated answers like Abb and F## are converted to simpler enharmonic names.
Single accidentals are still preserved, so Ab degree 4 remains Db.
open_issues: Repository-wide typecheck and build are currently blocked by an existing music-analysis export conflict outside this task scope.
